title: Implement LCI message delivery receipt resource
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-py4c.1.14. The messaging contract is aligned on /msg/inbox for send/receive and /msg/sent for accepted sends, while spec/12-apps.md also defines POST /msg/ack for delivery/read/failure receipts. Implement the no-hardware Python CoAP resource/client handling for delivery receipts when the product wants local receipt support.
acceptance_criteria: Python CoAP resources expose /msg/ack only when receipt handling is configured; POST /msg/ack validates id/status/ts payloads and stores or dispatches receipts deterministically; /.well-known/core advertises /msg/ack only when mounted; LciClient/TUI behavior for delivery receipts is documented or tested; targeted no-hardware tests pass.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware Python delivery receipt support. Added optional MessageReceiptsResource for POST /msg/ack with deterministic in-memory storage and optional handler dispatch. build_site mounts /msg/ack only when message_receipts_resource is provided, so /.well-known/core advertises </msg/ack>;rt="msg.ack";ct="60" only when configured. Receipt payload validation now requires unsigned non-bool integer id, status in delivered/read/failed, and unsigned non-bool integer ts; invalid CBOR, non-map payloads, missing fields, bools, strings, floats, and negative values are rejected with 4.00.

Added client models ReceiptStatus, MessageReceipt, ReceiptResult and LciClient.send_message_receipt() for POST /msg/ack. Client maps 2.xx to accepted, 4.04/5.01 to unsupported, other non-success to rejected, transport exceptions to transport_error, and invalid local id/ts/status to validation_error before any transport call. TUI behavior remains documented/tested as ack=False by default; no read-receipt UI flow was added.

Docs/tests updated: docs/python-native-tui-support.md now lists optional GET /msg/sent and POST /msg/ack firmware prerequisites; python/tests/test_lci_contract_docs.py guards /msg/ack spec/support docs.

Tests/checks run locally: python/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q python/tests/coap/test_messages_resource.py python/tests/client/test_lci.py python/tests/tui/test_native.py python/tests/test_lci_contract_docs.py -> 123 passed in 11.95s. python/.venv/bin/python -m ruff check python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py python/src/lichen/coap/__init__.py python/src/lichen/client/model.py python/src/lichen/client/lci.py python/src/lichen/client/__init__.py python/tests/coap/test_messages_resource.py python/tests/client/test_lci.py python/tests/tui/test_native.py python/tests/test_lci_contract_docs.py -> All checks passed. git diff --check -> passed.

Code review: first review pair found P1/P2 id/ts validation drift and client validation gaps; fixed by enforcing uint id/ts and status validation. Final reviews: Mencius the 9th no P0/P1/P2 findings; Hilbert the 9th no P0/P1/P2 findings and independently ran 123 passing tests. No EC2 needed: Python CoAP/client/TUI/docs tests only.
close_reason: Completed: optional /msg/ack CoAP resource, client receipt helper, docs, tests, and clean final reviews.
